author: max
name: Enforce
install_msg:
Thanks for installing. This cog is in beta and may not function as expected but please report any issues.
Please note that you as a bot owner already bypass all enforcement.
If you enjoy my work, you can donate at [buymeacoffee](<https://buymeacoffee.com/ltzmax>)
description: Requires users to accept ToS and privacy policy before using any bot commands.
short: Requires users to accept ToS and privacy policy before using any bot commands.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any End User Data.
